Class ConnectionDsl

java.lang.Object
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl.ConnectionDsl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class ConnectionDsl extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Fluent builder for an active BLE connection.

Obtained via DeviceDsl.thenConnect(). Provides access to the raw connection operations as well as device-specific DSL sub-builders: 

connectionDsl.asLego()
             .motor(0x00).startSpeed(80)
             .hubAction().switchOff()
             .done();

Closing this builder (via done() or try-with-resources) disconnects the underlying peripheral and releases all native resources.

Thread safety: not thread-safe; do not share across threads.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @NonNull BuWizz2Dsl
    asBuWizz2()
    Returns a BuWizz2Dsl sub-builder for BuWizz 2.0 protocol operations on this connection.
    @NonNull BuWizz3Dsl
    asBuWizz3()
    Returns a BuWizz3Dsl sub-builder for BuWizz 3.0 protocol operations on this connection.
    @NonNull CircuitCubesDsl
    asCircuitCubes()
    Returns a CircuitCubesDsl sub-builder for Circuit Cubes operations on this connection.
    @NonNull LegoDsl
    asLego()
    Returns a LegoDsl sub-builder for LEGO Wireless Protocol 3.0 operations on this connection.
    @NonNull SBrickDsl
    asSBrick()
    Returns an SBrickDsl sub-builder for SBrick protocol operations on this connection.
    void
    close()
    Closes the connection; delegates to done().
    @NonNull BleConnection
    connection()
    Returns the underlying BleConnection for callers that need direct access to the raw API.
    @NonNull BleDevice
    device()
    Returns the device this connection belongs to.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void>
    disconnect()
    Disconnects the peripheral asynchronously.
    void
    done()
    Disconnects the peripheral and releases all associated resources.
    @NonNull Flow.Publisher<byte[]>
    notifications(@NonNull String serviceUuid, @NonNull String characteristicUuid)
    Subscribes to notifications from a GATT characteristic.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<byte[]>
    read(@NonNull String serviceUuid, @NonNull String characteristicUuid)
    Reads the current value of a GATT characteristic.
    @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void>
    writeWithoutResponse(@NonNull String serviceUuid, @NonNull String characteristicUuid, byte[] data)
    Writes a byte array to a GATT characteristic without waiting for a response (Write Without Response).

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • device

      public @NonNull BleDevice device()
      Returns the device this connection belongs to.
      Returns:
      the associated BleDevice; never null

    • writeWithoutResponse

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> writeWithoutResponse(@NonNull String serviceUuid, @NonNull String characteristicUuid, byte[] data)
      Writes a byte array to a GATT characteristic without waiting for a response (Write Without Response).
      Parameters:
      serviceUuid - GATT service UUID
      characteristicUuid - GATT characteristic UUID
      data - bytes to write; must not be empty
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the write is submitted

    • notifications

      public @NonNull Flow.Publisher<byte[]> notifications(@NonNull String serviceUuid, @NonNull String characteristicUuid)
      Subscribes to notifications from a GATT characteristic.
      Parameters:
      serviceUuid - GATT service UUID
      characteristicUuid - GATT characteristic UUID
      Returns:
      a publisher of notification payloads; never null

    • read

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<byte[]> read(@NonNull String serviceUuid, @NonNull String characteristicUuid)
      Reads the current value of a GATT characteristic.
      Parameters:
      serviceUuid - GATT service UUID
      characteristicUuid - GATT characteristic UUID
      Returns:
      a future that completes with the read bytes; never null

    • disconnect

      public @NonNull CompletableFuture<Void> disconnect()
      Disconnects the peripheral asynchronously.
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the disconnect is acknowledged; never null

    • asLego

      public @NonNull LegoDsl asLego()
      Returns a LegoDsl sub-builder for LEGO Wireless Protocol 3.0 operations on this connection.
      Returns:
      the LEGO DSL sub-builder; never null

    • asSBrick

      public @NonNull SBrickDsl asSBrick()
      Returns an SBrickDsl sub-builder for SBrick protocol operations on this connection.
      Returns:
      the SBrick DSL sub-builder; never null

    • asCircuitCubes

      public @NonNull CircuitCubesDsl asCircuitCubes()
      Returns a CircuitCubesDsl sub-builder for Circuit Cubes operations on this connection.
      Returns:
      the Circuit Cubes DSL sub-builder; never null

    • asBuWizz2

      public @NonNull BuWizz2Dsl asBuWizz2()
      Returns a BuWizz2Dsl sub-builder for BuWizz 2.0 protocol operations on this connection.
      Returns:
      the BuWizz 2.0 DSL sub-builder; never null

    • asBuWizz3

      public @NonNull BuWizz3Dsl asBuWizz3()
      Returns a BuWizz3Dsl sub-builder for BuWizz 3.0 protocol operations on this connection.
      Returns:
      the BuWizz 3.0 DSL sub-builder; never null

    • connection

      public @NonNull BleConnection connection()
      Returns the underlying BleConnection for callers that need direct access to the raw API.
      Returns:
      the connection; never null

    • done

      public void done() throws BleException
      Disconnects the peripheral and releases all associated resources.

      Equivalent to connection.close(). This method satisfies both the AutoCloseable contract and the DSL terminal convention of ending a chain with .done().

      Throws:
      BleException - if the disconnect fails

    • close

      public void close() throws BleException
      Closes the connection; delegates to done().
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Throws:
      BleException - if the disconnect fails
